speedy watercraft powered by a buzzing motor, ready for exciting aquatic adventures! The

very own boat. As they construct their boat, they'll learn about the principles of buoyancy.

Connect 100+ Devices. Designed for connecting 100+ devices, everyone is able to enjoy a more efficient network that loads faster without dragging down performance.

name: Siyol Hg1200 Wi Fi Access Point Range Extender
description:
Overview:
Advantages of Access Point AC 1200
The AC 1200 access point offers several advantages, making it a popular choice for both home and business networking. It works as an extender as well.
1. Dual-Band Connectivity
Simultaneous Dual-Band Operation:
Supports both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands, providing flexibility for different devices and reducing interference.
2. High-Speed Wireless Performance
Suitable for Multiple Users:
Capable of handling multiple devices and users simultaneously without significant drops in performance.
3. Advanced Security Features
Guest Network Capabilities:
Allows the creation of separate guest networks to keep the primary network secure while offering internet access to visitors.
4. Ease of Setup and Management
User-Friendly Setup:
Often comes with easy setup options, such as web-based configuration and app-based setup processes.
5. Enhanced Coverage and Range
Beamforming Technology:
Focuses the Wi-Fi signal directly towards connected devices, enhancing signal strength and reliability.
6. Compatibility and Expandability
Scalable Networking:
Can be easily integrated into larger networks, making it suitable for both small and medium-sized businesses.

name: Cudy 24 Port Gigabit Desktop Switch
description:
Overview:
Gigabit Ports for Faster Speed
Increase the speed of your network with the 8-port Gigabit switch. Non-blocking, 8 10/100/1000Mbps ports enables instant transferring of large, bandwidth intensive files without interference.
High Performance
Auto-negotiation RJ-45 ports can provide large file transferring and also be compatible with any 10/100/1000Mbps Ethernet devices.IEEE 802.3x flow control for Full Duplex mode and backpressure for Half Duplex mode offer increased bandwidth to alleviate network congestion, making the switch work reliably.
Energy Efficient and Power Saving
Automatically adjusts Power consumption according to the link status and cable length.This Gigabit Desktop Switch features the innovative energy-efficient technologies that can greatly expand your network capacity with much less power.

Specifications:
Complies with IEEE 802.3, IEEE 802.3u, IEEE802.3x and IEEE 802.3ab standards
24 10/100/1000Mbps Auto-Negotiation, Auto-MDI/MDIX ports provide smart switching between 10Mbps, 100Mbps and 1000Mbps hardware
Non-blocking switching architecture enables full wire-speed packets forwarding and filtering
Store-and-Forward switching method
Supports 16K MAC address auto-learning and auto-agin

name: Cudy 8 Port Gigabit Poe Switch
description:
Overview:
120 W Power budget & 30 W Maximum One Port
Supports a total PoE power of 120 W and up to 30 W for one PoE port. Non-standard PoE devices or normal PoE switches are not burned. Meets IEEE802.3af / at standard.
Watchdog guarantees uninterrupted operation of the PoE devices
The PoE watchdog continuously monitors the connection status of remote hosts. If an error is detected on the remote PoE device, the PoE switch immediately restarts the device to bring it back to normal operation.
Plug&Play, Fanless design
Plug and Play, Easy of use.Fanless design for silent operation.Made of high-quality metal case, sturdy and durable with long service life, provide better heat dissipation, suitable for most environment. Pin assignment, Mode A: 1/2(+),3/6(-)

CLIMATE PLEDGE FRIENDLY – We considered sustainability in the design of this device with 100% recyclable packaging, 100% post-consumer recycled polyester yarn, and 55% post-consumer recycled plastics.

name: Prolink Ds 3105 3Mp Home Security Camera
description:
Overview:
The Prolink Dual Band Home Security Camera (DS-3105) is a 3MP 2K Smart Wi-Fi Pan/Tilt/Zoom IP Camera. With its 120-degrees wide-angle lens and the additional night vision feature (clear visibility of up to 10 meters), the device enables users to capture sharp and clear moving objects both day and night – the perfect indoor monitoring device.
Prolink Home Security Camera can also be easily set up and connected to the wireless network with the Prolink mEzee mobile app, giving users full control to the device settings anytime, anywhere. With the built-in microSD card slot, videos can also be stored, and played back easily. Alternatively, recording can be saved directly to the cloud storage. Other key features include motion sensor and push notifications, which alerts users when there is a motion event detected.

name: Comstox Zlt T10 Max 4G Lte Router
description:
Overview:
ZLT T10 MAX is a 4G CPE with TYPE-C interface. It supports 2G/3G/4G communication and converts 2G/3G/4G wireless network data into WIFI signals. The device supports single frequency 40MHz bandwidth 2.4G WIFI4, supports NAT and DHCP, firewall and VPN functions.
It is suitable for various scenarios such as homes, small shops, and personal applications that require mobile Internet access, and provides users with reliable and high-speed 4G wireless broadband network access.

Specifications:
Hardware Features
Sanechips 4G chipset with broad network compatibility
4G universal frequency band design supporting global mainstream 4G bands (refer to hardware specifications for details)
Supports LTE speeds up to 50 Mbps (uplink) and 150 Mbps (downlink)
Single-band 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi 4 design with 40 MHz bandwidth
Type-C interface for power supply
USB RNDIS virtual network port support
One 100 Mbps Ethernet port
SLIC voice functionality support
Software Innovation
Supports IPv6/IPv4, TCP/IP, UDP, HTTP, and other standard network protocols
Built-in SMS functionality
Multi-APN management support
Traffic statistics and usage monitoring
Compatible with TR-069 platform management
PIN/PUK management support
